summary: Mixed recording quality on an otherwise solid show highlighted by a blistering Scarlet > Fire jam.
review: Fans rave about the groove and especially the scorching Scarlet > Fire sequence, noting wonderful drums and a solid setlist.  The soundboard tape is uneven – vocal mix issues mute Bob’s voice and Jerry’s presence at times, leaving the overall listening experience only fair.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical moments (Scarlet > Fire) boost the rating, but vocal‑mix problems and mixed reviewer opinions on sound quality pull it down.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard capture is usable but suffers from a poor vocal mix – Bob’s vocals are barely audible and Jerry’s guitar often buried.  Overall clarity is okay, drums stand out.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set described as solid with a good groove; however some listeners feel the band was “getting their bearings” early in the night.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for funk‑filled thump on Scarlet>Fire, but elsewhere his guitar is muted and barely present.
band_member_comments.Bob: Vocal mix drowns out Bob’s voice, especially in the first set.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums described as wonderful and a highlight of the performance.
